name: Handoff Courier
description: A polished menu-bar courier for moving files, snippets, and exports between apps without window gymnastics.
short_description: A polished menu-bar courier for moving files, snippets, and exports between apps without window gymnastics.
default_prompt: Use $handoff-courier to build a polished macOS menu-bar utility for a polished menu-bar courier for moving files, snippets, and exports between apps without window gymnastics.
audience: People juggling files across chat and browser apps
detail_lines: Collects files, text, and export bundles into a single calm handoff tray.
Shows the next destination and the cleanest transfer path before you commit.
Keeps the transfer UI minimal so it feels native on macOS instead of bolted on.
